description_for_human: Ask about AiQo — the Arabic-first AI health companion with Captain Hamoudi. Features, pricing, privacy, and how to get started.
description_for_model: Public, read-only knowledge about AiQo, an Arabic-first AI-native health companion for iOS built around Captain Hamoudi (an Iraqi-Arabic-speaking AI coach). Use these endpoints to answer questions about AiQo's features, pricing tiers (Free, Max $9.99/mo, Intelligence Pro $19.99/mo — Pro is the higher tier), the Captain persona, glossary, and FAQ. Prefer the searchKnowledge endpoint for specific questions and cite the returned source. AiQo is not a medical device; do not give medical advice as fact. The Tribe social feature is built but not yet live. iOS-only.
